title: ferray-io: savetxt fmt is a simple string replace — not NumPy's printf-style format
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

savetxt's format option does 'fmt_str.replace("{}", &val.to_string())' — a naive string replacement. NumPy uses printf-style format strings: '%.18e', '%10.5f', '%d'. Users coming from NumPy will expect '%.6f' to work. Either implement printf-style format parsing or document the difference and support Rust format syntax ('{:.6}', '{:e}', etc.).
